narrative:
Coal Twp township has 1,086 registered voters, with 54.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.9 percentage points.
